mapper.select: SELECT ID, WAREHOUSE_IN_TITLE, WAREHOUSE_IN_NO, WAREHOUSE_IN_TYPE_CODE, WAREHOUSE_IN_TYPE_NAME, WAREHOUSE_IN_DATE, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, WAREHOUSE_ID, WAREHOUSE_NAME, SUPPLIER_ID, SUPPLIER_NAME, REMARKS, DELIVERY_PERSON_ID, DELIVERY_PERSON_NAME, ACCEPTANCE_PERSON_ID, ACCEPTANCE_PERSON_NAME, ACCEPTANCE_STATUS, ACCEPTANCE_REMARKS, BATCH_NO, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN ( ID, WAREHOUSE_IN_TITLE, WAREHOUSE_IN_NO, WAREHOUSE_IN_TYPE_CODE, WAREHOUSE_IN_TYPE_NAME, WAREHOUSE_IN_DATE, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, WAREHOUSE_ID, WAREHOUSE_NAME, SUPPLIER_ID, SUPPLIER_NAME, REMARKS, DELIVERY_PERSON_ID, DELIVERY_PERSON_NAME, ACCEPTANCE_PERSON_ID, ACCEPTANCE_PERSON_NAME, ACCEPTANCE_REMARKS, BATCH_NO, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{warehouseInTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseInNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseInTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseInTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseInDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{deptId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{supplierName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deliveryPersonId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{deliveryPersonName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acceptancePersonId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{acceptancePersonName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acceptanceRemarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{batchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN
WAREHOUSE_IN_TITLE = #{warehouseInTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WAREHOUSE_IN_NO = #{warehouseInNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WAREHOUSE_IN_TYPE_CODE = #{warehouseInTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WAREHOUSE_IN_TYPE_NAME = #{warehouseInTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WAREHOUSE_IN_DATE = #{warehouseInDate,jdbcType=DATE},
DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
DEPT_NAME = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
WAREHOUSE_NAME = #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SUPPLIER_ID = #{supplierId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
SUPPLIER_NAME = #{supplierName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REMARKS = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DELIVERY_PERSON_ID = #{deliveryPersonId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
DELIVERY_PERSON_NAME = #{deliveryPersonName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ACCEPTANCE_PERSON_ID = #{acceptancePersonId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ACCEPTANCE_PERSON_NAME = #{acceptancePersonName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ACCEPTANCE_STATUS = #{acceptanceStatus,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ACCEPTANCE_REMARKS = #{acceptanceRemarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BATCH_NO = #{batchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
WHERE ID = #{id}
